meta.summary: Senior iOS product engineer focused on consumer-facing applications, shared loyalty platforms, and cross-application SDK integration. Owned Premium Subscription and a shared Premium Subscription SDK at Birmarket (PASHA), designed and implemented a unified analytics API in the loyalty SDK, and contributed to marketplace commerce at scale. Shipped Drinkit from MVP to the App Store on a three-person iOS team. Recent work includes watchOS voice AI R&D and realtime client flows on Apple platforms; commercial RxSwift experience at PLAYHERA. 12+ years shipping from indie apps to national-scale marketplaces.

roles.title: Senior iOS Engineer
roles.project: Apple Watch Voice AI — R&D project
roles.productDescription: Apple Watch Voice AI — watchOS client with iPhone relay. Also beta-tested VelocityAI, GlobalLogic's AI-assisted SDLC platform.
roles.myRole: Senior iOS engineer on the watchOS client — architecture, Watch ↔ iPhone connectivity, TestFlight. Beta-tested VelocityAI separately; feedback from a shipping iOS perspective.
bullets: watchOS voice AI with on-device conversation flows.
No WebSocket on Watch — iPhone relay for audio and server sync; dedup with URLSessionWebSocketTask.
Split Watch/iPhone work around platform limits; TestFlight under watchOS constraints (background, audio, connectivity).
On-device intents refresh navigation and forms locally.
Beta-tested VelocityAI — ran a sample product cycle from idea to release.
bulletsShort: Built watchOS voice conversation flows and iPhone relay for realtime WebSocket/audio communication.
Integrated watchOS/iPhone communication, audio handling, and App Intents under watchOS runtime and TestFlight constraints.
Contributed iOS engineering feedback while beta-testing VelocityAI through a sample product cycle from idea to release.
bulletsOnePage: Built watchOS voice conversation flows and worked on an iPhone relay for realtime WebSocket/audio communication.
Integrated watchOS/iPhone communication, audio handling, and App Intents under watchOS runtime and TestFlight constraints.
Contributed iOS engineering feedback while beta-testing VelocityAI through a sample product cycle from idea to release.

roles.title: Senior iOS Engineer
roles.project: Birmarket — online marketplace & loyalty · Loyalty squad
roles.productDescription: Birmarket (Umico) — multi-vendor marketplace in Azerbaijan: 500,000+ products, 900+ pickup points, Bir Bonus loyalty. Joined at startup scale; shipped commerce and loyalty SDKs as the product grew nationally. Shared loyalty SDK embedded in multiple host apps.
roles.myRole: Senior iOS on Birmarket commerce and Loyalty squad — Premium Subscription, Analytics module, shared Premium Subscription SDK; per-app config for host apps.
bullets: Catalog through orders for 500,000+ SKUs and 900+ pickup points — multiple App Store releases.
Owned Premium Subscription — UI, checkout wiring, subscription status on the feature side.
Designed and implemented a unified analytics API in the loyalty SDK, routing events to Amplitude, Mixpanel, AppsFlyer, Firebase, PostHog, and Sentry.
Pulled Premium Subscription into a shared SDK with per-host configuration.
bulletsShort: Owned Premium Subscription and shared Premium Subscription SDK with per-host configuration across multiple host apps.
Designed and implemented a unified analytics API in the loyalty SDK, routing events to six providers including Firebase, AppsFlyer, Amplitude, Mixpanel, PostHog, and Sentry.
Contributed to consumer marketplace flows across catalog, loyalty, and ordering in a product with 500,000+ SKUs and 900+ pickup points.
bulletsOnePage: Owned Premium Subscription on iOS and a shared Premium Subscription SDK with per-host configuration across multiple host applications.
Designed and implemented a unified analytics API in the loyalty SDK, routing events to six providers including Firebase, AppsFlyer, Amplitude, Mixpanel, PostHog, and Sentry.
Contributed to consumer marketplace flows across catalog, loyalty, and ordering in a product with 500,000+ SKUs and 900+ pickup points.

onePage.summary: Senior iOS product engineer with 12+ years of experience building consumer-facing applications. Recent work spans marketplace and loyalty products, shared iOS SDKs, subscription features, product analytics infrastructure, and realtime voice AI R&D. Owned iOS features and reusable SDK components at Birmarket, shipped Drinkit from MVP to the App Store in a three-person iOS team, and worked with RxSwift in a production esports application. Strong in Swift, UIKit/SwiftUI, concurrency, modular iOS architecture, and realtime client flows.
